{"status":"pass","execution_plan":[{"step":1,"action":"Install vitest and @types/node as dev dependencies","command":"npm install --no-package-lock -D vitest @types/node"},{"step":2,"action":"Create vitest.config.ts with jsdom environment","file":"vitest.config.ts","content":"import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config';
